text: Welcome, guide_sam! 🎉 You've joined as an Event Helper — we're excited to have you on the events team. Check out #events-planning to get started and say hi to the crew!
Welcome to the community, helper_alex! 🎉 You've been approved as a Moderator. Please review the mod guidelines in #mod-handbook and introduce yourself in #team-intros. Glad to have you!
Welcome, mentor_lina! 🌟 You've been approved as a Mentor — a role we really value here. Head over to #mentor-lounge to connect with the mentorship team and get oriented. So glad you're here!
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! 👋 You've been approved as a Member. Feel free to explore, introduce yourself in #introductions, and don't hesitate to ask if you need anything!
